cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a local pharmacy around urgent-night needs using trust-first messaging and a bounded CTA
input.offer_info: urgent-use route, no diagnosis or cure claims, clear timing framing
input.audience_segment: local users dealing with fever, cold, stomach and night-time urgent needs

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects timing and family role

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a family stock-up route
input.audience_segment: users preparing family medicine cabinets, school-season or travel stock-ups

mustInclude: boundary that this is a prep and fit-check route

input.strategy_route: Write copy for returning-customer refill reminders
input.offer_info: refill route with quantity and timing check
input.audience_segment: existing customers replenishing chronic-use medicine or household health supplies

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for explanation-sensitive first-time visitors
input.offer_info: store-proof-first route with no diagnosis or cure phrasing
input.audience_segment: users worried about whether they can ask a pharmacist and buy the right common medicine

mustInclude: CTA that collects concern and visit window
